name: me-elton-john
description: Elton John's official autobiography — the creative partnership with Bernie Taupin, surviving addiction, coming out, founding the AIDS Foundation, and finding love with David Furnish.
useCase: Understanding creative partnerships, surviving addiction, living authentically, using success for philanthropic impact, finding love after chaos.
knownRisks: Elton's memory of events may be colored by decades of drug use and time
Some names and minor details have been changed for legal reasons
Elton's perspective on certain people (e.g., John Reid, his mother) may be influenced by their subsequent relationship breakdowns
Explicit content: drug use, sex, bulimia — may be triggering for some readers
